description: Local-only Browser Evidence Capture planning manifest skeleton derived from Employer Brand Audit Project V0 fixture employer-brand-audit-project:symphony-talent-phenom-radancy.

requests.evidence_goal: Capture the primary employer value proposition and talent promise.
requests.notes: Planning skeleton only; supply a local fixture page and locator before capture. Company role: client. Source category: Careers or jobs site (attempt_if_available). Expected source kinds: careers_home, jobs_home. Project notes: The local fixture includes one careers-style HTML page per company.

requests.evidence_goal: Capture explicit EVP, culture, values, benefits, and employee promise messaging.
requests.notes: Planning skeleton only; supply a local fixture page and locator before capture. Company role: client. Source category: Employer brand, culture, mission, values, or benefits pages (attempt_if_available). Expected source kinds: culture_page, benefits_page, values_page. Project notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.

requests.evidence_goal: Capture social proof, talent-facing positioning, and active hiring signals.
requests.notes: Planning skeleton only; supply a local fixture page and locator before capture. Company role: client. Source category: LinkedIn company, life, and jobs presence (attempt_if_available). Expected source kinds: linkedin_company, linkedin_life, linkedin_jobs. Project notes: Not collected from live sites in this fixture.

requests.evidence_goal: Capture employee sentiment, ratings, and recurring themes when available.
requests.notes: Planning skeleton only; supply a local fixture page and locator before capture. Company role: client. Source category: Review platforms (required). Expected source kinds: glassdoor, indeed, comparably. Project notes: Review platforms are required by the workflow policy but unavailable in this static local fixture.

requests.evidence_goal: Capture recruiting campaign tone, proof points, and engagement examples.
